visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women sit at a white table. The woman on the left wears a blue beret and a cream sweater; the woman on the right has long black hair and a matching cream top. They hold a white meal box while a large Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) A close-up shows a menu board featuring a bowl of braised pork rice with an egg and sausages, priced at 99. The background shows parts of a food court menu. (3) A brief shot of a kitchen worker wearing red gloves and a cap weighing a white food container on a digital scale in a brightly lit industrial kitchen. (4) Back to the two women, they are opening the container to reveal the contents. The lighting is bright and even. (5) A close-up focus on the food container reveals white rice topped with minced pork sauce, accompanied by three small red sausages, one meatball, and sliced pickled cucumbers. (6) The woman on the left holds up a pink and white packet of 'Formosa Chang' braised pork sauce, comparing the contents to the meal. (7) The women use forks to eat the food, showing exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment, such as wide eyes and hands covering their mouths. (8) Detailed shots of a fork picking up a slice of cucumber and then a small sausage. (9) The women continue to talk and eat, gesturing towards the food box, with animated text appearing around them.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 99元吃看看. [Subtitle]: 好市多竟然有. (2) [Slogan]: 好市多竟然賣滷肉飯?. (3) [Subtitle]: 滷肉便當. (4) [Slogan]: 99塊我究竟. [Slogan]: 日式關東煮 99. (5) [Variety]: 哇哦. [Subtitle]: 它裡面總共給你一個貢丸. (6) [Subtitle]: 三個珍珠香腸. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後一個醃制的菜. (8) [Subtitle]: 上面淋滿了滷肉醬的飯. (9) [Subtitle]: 大概是一份掌的份量. (10) [Logo]: FORMOSA CHANG. [Slogan]: 鬍鬚張. (11) [Subtitle]: 因為我一直以為是鬍鬚張然後倒出來的. (12) [Subtitle]: 如果是鬍鬚張那這一碗太便宜了好. (13) [Variety]: 嗯~ 嗯~ 嗯~. (14) [Subtitle]: 好吃嗎. (15) [Subtitle]: 它的肥肉QQ的好香哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 我覺得這滷肉很可以. (17) [Subtitle]: 而且滷肉量給的很多. (18) [Subtitle]: 它每個飯都有吸飽它的肉汁. (19) [Subtitle]: 然後它的飯粒是偏軟的那一種. (20) [Subtitle]: 但是混著它的湯汁很入味. (21) [Subtitle]: 它的醃漬菜很好吃. (22) [Subtitle]: 那個小黃瓜醃的脆脆酸酸的. (23) [Subtitle]: 選擇是小香腸. (24) [Variety]: 嗯~. [Subtitle]: 好好吃哦. (25) [Subtitle]: 跟關東煮吃起來完全不一樣. (26) [Subtitle]: 我覺得這個便當雖然99塊很貴. (27) [Subtitle]: 可是它每一個東西都做的很認真. (28) [Subtitle]: 如果你是喜歡吃軟軟的飯的人他很好吃. (29) [Subtitle]: 這整個便當我會給它8分. (30) [Subtitle]: 我覺得很好吃. (31) [Subtitle]: 它99元哎. (32) [Subtitle]: 但它很好吃哎. (33) [Subtitle]: 這小香腸也好好吃哦. (34) [Subtitle]: 60塊就會有很多人買. (35) [Subtitle]: 69.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators in the foreground, 1 staff member visible briefly in the kitchen background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one wears a navy blue beret and white knit sweater, the other has long black hair and a similar white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A stone-textured wall behind the creators; a professional kitchen and a Costco food court menu board in other scenes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic BGM starts. A female voice speaks rapidly with high energy. No SFX present. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX sounds as a new visual element is shown. The speech continues with a friendly, animated tone. (3) A 'bubble pop' SFX triggers during the food reveal. The BGM maintains a steady, driving rhythm. (4) Multiple 'sparkle' and high-pitched 'cartoon' SFX occur as the speakers express delight through vocalizations like 'Mhm!' and 'Wow!'. (5) Rapid-fire editing is reflected in the audio with short, energetic vocal phrases and recurring 'ding' SFX for each ingredient listed. (6) A transition 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a camera move. The BGM remains at a consistent volume throughout. (7) Final vocal summary with high arousal and positive valence, ending cleanly with a final speech phrase.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Ingredient Breakdown -> Taste Test -> Value Assessment
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a newly discovered braised pork rice meal at Costco, evaluating its contents, taste, and value for money compared to famous brands like Formosa Chang.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a brand is mentioned and shown, it is used as a comparison point rather than a direct promotion; the tone is investigative.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media food review vlog with high-density text and SFX to maintain viewer engagement. The mention of Formosa Chang serves as a quality benchmark.
